window_summary: This window tracks the recent mitmproxy/mitmproxy release stream from v10.1.2 through v12.2.3, covering a series of patch, minor, and major releases. Each release note points to the project CHANGELOG for detailed changes and directs users to the official download page.

questions.query_text: In the mitmproxy/mitmproxy releases, which release note directs users to the CHANGELOG.md for detailed changes and provides a link to the latest release packages at https://mitmproxy.org/downloads/?

answer_support.answer_text: In the mitmproxy/mitmproxy release v10.1.2, the release note refers users to the CHANGELOG.md for detailed changes and provides a link to the latest release packages at https://mitmproxy.org/downloads/.

In the mitmproxy/mitmproxy release v10.1.3, the release note refers users to the CHANGELOG.md for detailed changes and provides a link to the latest release packages at https://mitmproxy.org/downloads/.

In the mitmproxy/mitmproxy release v10.1.4, the release note refers users to the CHANGELOG.md for detailed changes and provides a link to the latest release packages at https://mitmproxy.org/downloads/.

questions.query_text: Across the mitmproxy/mitmproxy releases, how does the release note content of v10.1.2 differ from that of v12.2.3?

options.text: v10.1.2 includes a detailed list of new features, while v12.2.3 only mentions bug fixes.
v10.1.2 provides a direct download link for Windows binaries, while v12.2.3 does not.
Both release notes contain identical text, referring users to the CHANGELOG.md and the downloads page.
v10.1.2 announces a major version upgrade, while v12.2.3 is a prerelease.

questions.expected_answer: Both release notes contain identical text, referring users to the CHANGELOG.md and the downloads page.

answer_support.answer_text: In the mitmproxy/mitmproxy release v10.1.2, the release note refers users to the CHANGELOG.md for detailed changes and provides a link to the latest release packages at https://mitmproxy.org/downloads/.

In the mitmproxy/mitmproxy release v12.2.3, the release note refers users to the CHANGELOG.md for detailed changes and provides a link to the latest release packages at https://mitmproxy.org/downloads/.
